creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
Compilation of amavisd-new fails if MILTER option is unchecked

# pwd
/usr/ports/security/amavisd-new
# make
cd /usr/ports/security/amavisd-new && make config;
(Here I simply uncheck box for MILTER and change nothing else)
===>  Found saved configuration for amavisd-new-2.4.5_2,1
===>  Extracting for amavisd-new-2.4.5_2,1
=> MD5 Checksum OK for amavisd-new-2.4.5.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for amavisd-new-2.4.5.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for amavisd-new-2.4.5_2,1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for amavisd-new-2.4.5_2,1
===>  Configuring for amavisd-new-2.4.5_2,1
===>  Building for amavisd-new-2.4.5_2,1
libmilter not available, not building amavis-milter and amavis

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: see above
